doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such State Bar of California protocol exists, and California has not authorized paralegals to perform this scope of work or waived Business & Professions Code §6125 in this manner.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 94
REASON: No such State Bar of California protocol exists; California has not authorized paralegals to engage in this scope of independent practice, and the cited statutory waiver of §6125 is implausible.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 94
REASON: No such State Bar of California protocol exists, and California has not authorized paralegals to perform this scope of work or waived Business & Professions Code §6125 in this manner.
